case_title: PARANO, FRANCES VS BRIODY, BOB et al

docket_entries.description: CERT. RECEIPT TO BOB BRIODY RETURNED SIGNED.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $463.84 FILED BY PARANO, FRANCES AS TO DEFENDANT BRIODY, BOB BRIODY, BOB (LOCATED AT ALAN ROBERT DESIGN) ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-30-1994 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 03

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PARANO, FRANCES RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BRIODY, BOB BRIODY, BOB (LOCATED AT ALAN ROBERT DESIGN) $463.84 PRINCIPAL, $20.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $483.84 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL
